prompt:
An 80 L planted aquarium immediately after a water change: the waterline is fresh and clear, small ripples show recent refill, and a gravel-vac tube and bucket sit off to the side in soft focus. Plants look upright and healthy, with a subtle sense of “just maintained.”

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future home aquaria aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean tools, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the aquarium as the main subject with gentle cues (bucket/tube) that indicate a completed water change.
